name: facct-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for ACM FAccT (the Conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency): the flagship interdisciplinary responsible-AI venue where fairness, accountability, and transparency are first-class contributions across CS, law, social science, humanities, and policy. Covers OpenReview mutually-anonymous submission, the Accept/Revise/Reject revise-and-resubmit cycle, ACM acmart archival proceedings, the required endmatter statements (Generative AI Usage, Ethical Considerations, Adverse Impacts, Positionality), datasheet/model-card/impact-assessment documentation, and the co-located CRAFT program. Grounded in the FAccT 2026 CFP, Author/Reviewer Guides, facctconference.org, ACM DL, and dblp checked on 2026-07-09.
